context: Tests whether the agent implements the cart drawer as a bottom sheet on mobile and sidebar on desktop, with correct overscroll containment, body scroll locking, safe-area-inset-bottom on checkout button, responsive hero image using the picture element with art direction, and correct font-size for iOS input zoom prevention.

checklist.name: Desktop sidebar layout
checklist.description: On desktop the cart drawer is positioned as a right-side sidebar: `position: fixed; right: 0; top: 0; bottom: 0` with `width: min(400px, 100vw)` and hidden via `transform: translateX(100%)`

checklist.name: Mobile bottom sheet
checklist.description: At max-width: 640px the drawer switches to a bottom sheet: `top: auto; width: 100vw; height: 85vh; transform: translateY(100%)`

checklist.name: Bottom sheet border radius
checklist.description: The mobile bottom sheet has `border-radius: 16px 16px 0 0` (rounded top corners, flat bottom)

checklist.name: overscroll-behavior contain
checklist.description: The cart drawer container applies `overscroll-behavior: contain` to prevent body scroll from leaking when scrolling inside the drawer

checklist.name: Body scroll lock — overflow hidden
checklist.description: When the drawer opens, `overflow: hidden` is applied to the body element to prevent background scrolling

checklist.name: Body scroll lock — touch-action
checklist.description: When the drawer opens, `touch-action: none` is applied to the body (or document.documentElement) to prevent touch scroll on mobile

checklist.name: Checkout button sticky bottom
checklist.description: The checkout button uses `position: sticky; bottom: 0` so it stays at the bottom of the drawer as the item list scrolls

checklist.name: Checkout safe area inset
checklist.description: The checkout button's padding-bottom includes `env(safe-area-inset-bottom)` (e.g., via calc()) to avoid being hidden behind the iPhone home indicator

checklist.name: Picture element art direction
checklist.description: The HeroBanner uses a `<picture>` element with at least two `<source>` tags to serve different image crops for mobile and desktop viewports

checklist.name: Hero image loading attributes
checklist.description: The hero `` tag includes `loading="eager"` and `fetchpriority="high"` (NOT loading="lazy")

checklist.name: WebP format in hero
checklist.description: The hero image sources reference .webp format files (in srcset or src attributes)

checklist.name: Body font size 16px
checklist.description: CSS sets body font-size to at least 16px (to prevent iOS auto-zoom when input fields are focused)

checklist.name: No hover-only CTA states
checklist.description: Interactive button states use :focus-visible and/or :active rather than (or in addition to) :hover for primary CTAs
